HSEHLD_SIZE_CD 
LABEL: 
Household Size Used To Determine Medicaid or CHIP Eligibility — Latest in Year 
DESCRIPTION: Household size used in the Medicaid or CHIP eligibility determination process; most recent in the 
calendar and the two prior years.

LONG NAME: HSEHLD_SIZE_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR

2 
FILE(S):
